success_factors: End-to-end workflow status is success with all expected nodes executed (download, analysis, env, generate, run, review, finalize)
Import-based adapter strategy was appropriate for NeuroKit (import feasibility 0.95, low intrusiveness risk)
Generated MCP service started successfully and reported healthy over stdio transport
Target endpoint set is meaningful and aligned with NeuroKit high-value APIs (14 domain-relevant tools)
failure_reasons: Original project tests were not executed/passed despite reported 100% coverage metadata, indicating test-reporting inconsistency
DeepWiki enrichment failed, reducing external architectural/context confidence
Performance telemetry and generation metrics were not captured (0 values), limiting objective efficiency analysis
